message:
test(ingest): add pane_uuid stability tests across rename/move/session churn

17 new tests verifying pane_uuid stability through realistic scenarios:
- UUID format (32-char lowercase hex) and random entropy
- UUID stable across title change, cwd change, tab/window move
- UUID removed on pane close, new UUID on reappearance
- Reverse index consistency across multiple panes
- Generation counter increments on fingerprint change
- PaneFingerprint same_generation and new_generation detection
- Multi-pane churn scenario (discover, change, close, reappear)

wa-upg.4.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
